## Summary

What does this PR add or change?

## Contribution Type

- [ ] New bundle
- [ ] Bundle improvement
- [ ] Registry metadata
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Validation/tooling

## Bundle Checklist

- [ ] Bundle has `index.md`, `log.md`, and a category core file.
- [ ] Markdown files have YAML frontmatter with `type`.
- [ ] Registry metadata is updated when needed.
- [ ] Sources are credited.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private paths, personal data, or confidential material are included.
- [ ] Risky tool actions require explicit user confirmation.
- [ ] Regulated advice is scoped with appropriate caveats.

## Validation

Paste validation output or explain what was checked:

```text
python tools/validate-bundle/validate.py --root .
```
